architecture.notes: gemma4 architecture: SWA layers interleaved with global attention, plus shared_kv_layers (a subset of layers share KV cache). GeGLU + pre-norm + GQA. Partial-deletion semantics may diverge across SWA window boundaries and shared layers — SpecDec compatibility should be cross-checked with the actual shared_kv_layers metadata value.

full_clear: Error: AttributeError("'Llama' object has no attribute 'kv_cache_seq_rm'")
noop: Error: AttributeError("'Llama' object has no attribute 'kv_cache_seq_rm'")
partial_delete: Error: AttributeError("'Llama' object has no attribute 'kv_cache_seq_rm'")
swa_note: SWA model: partial_delete spans SWA window boundary; interpret with care.
